description_long: This surveillance camera assembly features a robust central vertical pole supporting multiple camera units and electronic components. The structure includes a square base with attached arms, each holding different types of surveillance cameras, such as a dome camera and box-style cameras, providing comprehensive coverage. The cameras are connected by visible wiring and reinforced with mounting brackets, suggesting a design for outdoor urban environments. The top of the pole is capped with a flat, square plate, likely for additional weather protection or mounting. The materials appear to be primarily metal with some plastic components, and the overall build is industrial and weather-resistant. The configuration allows for multi-directional monitoring, suitable for high-traffic public spaces.
description: A multi-camera surveillance unit mounted on a sturdy vertical pole with several attached arms, featuring dome and box cameras for wide-area monitoring. The structure is industrial, with visible wiring and robust metal construction.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central pole, square base, and three distinct camera units mounted on arms, with visible wiring and mounting brackets.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the dome camera on an extended arm and the arrangement of the other cameras, showing the depth and reach of the arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dome camera most prominently, with the other cameras and wiring visible on either side of the central pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focuses on the arm with the dome camera and the side profile of the box cameras, emphasizing the multi-directional coverage.
